I might add that when I switched to GL several times after I noticed this
problem I received messages that the parameters of xorg needed changes
otherwise I must use xRender for compositing and etc for my video.  I know
- I have a new [perhaps 5 months] AMD Radeon HD 7950 so the drivers are
still early drivers.
